description_long: This is a tall, rectangular filing cabinet constructed from dark wood with a rich, brown finish. The front face features two large, flat panels that likely correspond to drawers, each seamlessly integrated without visible handles or label holders. The sides and top are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing a minimalist, modern aesthetic. Subtle hinges are visible along one side, suggesting the drawers or doors open outward. The cabinet stands on small, barely noticeable feet or casters, elevating it slightly off the ground. Its robust build and understated design make it suitable for storing documents or office supplies in a professional or urban environment.
description: A tall, dark wood filing cabinet with two large, handle-less drawers and a minimalist, modern design. The surface is smooth and unadorned, with subtle hinges and a rich brown finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, flat drawer panels with no visible handles or label holders.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a smooth, uninterrupted wooden surface with visible hinges along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, featureless wooden panel with no openings or hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to the other side, with a smooth surface and subtle hinge details.
